title: hedysarum boreale var. utahense
intro: Hedysarum boreale var. utahense, also known as Utah sweet clover, is a perennial legume native to the western United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is rich in coumarin and other compounds that have been shown to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, Utah sweet clover is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves to promote wound healing, soothe digestive issues, and calm respiratory problems.
